signals.headline: BTC ETFs 5-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
BTC ETFs 5-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $238.37 million in net inflows on April 20, extending a 5-day streak—the strongest institutional bid since February—led by BlackRock’s IBIT at $256.05 million[1][3]. U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs saw $67.77 million inflows on the same day, marking their 8th consecutive day[3].
matched_markets: Bitcoin Up or Down - April 22, 10:15PM-10:30PM ET

signals.headline: Ether ETFs Weekly Inflows Hit $276M | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ether ETFs Weekly Inflows Hit $276M | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ether ETFs logged $276 million for the week ending April 20, with Fidelity’s FETH leading at $126 million per SoSoValue data[1]. Bitcoin traded up ~3.6% to $78,497 and ETH up 3.33% to $2,395 amid these flows[1].
